Marginalia.

Each essay here works through one free public lecture attended around Toronto, written within a few days of the talk while the room is still close enough to argue with.

TypeLecture commentary, long-form.
CoverageFree public lectures around Toronto.
CadenceDays to weeks after each lecture.
FormA piece per talk attended.
~ One lecture per essay, written within a few days of attending rather than the same night.
iWriting

Writing

↗ Pieces stay in their canonical section so each section reads as itself. They aggregate in the florilegium so the writing reads as a body of work.

New essays post as talks are attended. Subscribe through >open_transmission_ (a public reading doc).

  • No pieces yet. The first one is written after the first lecture is attended in earnest.
